title: manisuris latifolia
intro: Manisuris latifolia is a plant species, also known as the 'Indian snakeroot', which belongs to the Apiaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antispasmodic effects. The plant is believed to provide several health benefits, such as relieving menstrual cramps, treating respiratory issues, and reducing fever. Manisuris latifolia is often used in herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are typically made by steeping the plant's roots or leaves in hot water or a solvent.
